raw_consumer_statement: An online order was placed on Macys.com using my macys credit card on XX/XX/XXXX. Delivery shows as delivered vis XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX, USPS XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XX/XX/XXXX says delivered @ mailbox when no mailbox is in front of the home, they are community mailboxes, XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX, and XXXX but there is no longer tracking available for that. I contacted the Macys online order department and filed a claim explaining the packages were never received and the two items that needed to be picked up at the store were never picked up since they were no longer available. The claim was put in on XX/XX/XXXX, then the claim was denied with no reason given after that I spoke to multiple different people with multiple different departments and the claim kept getting denied, I was told to file a police report which I did and even emailed it to them and still they denied basically saying I still owe the {$400.00}, one explanation I got was that my name was linked to multiple macys online accounts, a long time ago I had a Macys card that was linked to an XXXX email which hasnt been used and then an XXXXXXXX XXXX both those accounts have been deleted but to them it doesnt matter as long as they have a reason to deny, it seems to me they really dont care about their customers at this point. Today XX/XX/XXXX when I called they said to file a claim unfortunately thats not possible because its been more than 60 days and Ive been trying to resolve this with Macys.
